Container.Name: openhinotes-bridge
Container.Overview: Bare-bones WebUSB bridge for HiDock P1: connect from browser, list/play/download/delete recordings on the device, push them to a server share, and trigger the meeting-diarizer batch run. Single container; pair with NPMPlus for HTTPS.

Config.Name: Path /data
Config.Description: Raw recordings dropped here by 'Push to server' and consumed by the diarizer batch driver.

Config.Name: Path /output
Config.Description: Where diarized transcripts and per-meeting details/ folders are written.

Config.Name: Docker socket
Config.Description: Mounted so the diarizer batch driver can start/stop the meeting-diarizer container directly. Grants root-equivalent host control to anything inside this container — keep behind NPMPlus on LAN.

Config.Name: HIDOCK_PROCESS_CMD
Config.Description: Command spawned by the 'Run process' button. Clear this to disable the diarizer integration.

Config.Name: DIARIZER_OUTPUT_DIR
Config.Description: Where the batch driver writes results inside the container (mounted from /mnt/user/data/media/meetings).

Config.Name: DIARIZER_THRESHOLD
Config.Description: Speaker-similarity cutoff passed to the diarizer.

Config.Name: MEETING_DIARIZER_CONTAINER
Config.Description: Name of the diarizer container the batch driver starts and stops.

Config.Name: DIARIZER_READY_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for the diarizer to answer /health after docker start.

Config.Name: DIARIZER_SKIP_POWER_MGMT
Config.Description: Set to 1/true to keep the diarizer always running (skip docker start/stop).
